detectors.description:
Reentrancy in PAJEETSTAN._transfer(address,address,uint256) (PAJEETSTAN.sol#1183-1241):
	External calls:
	- swapAndLiquify(contractTokenBalance) (PAJEETSTAN.sol#1221)
		- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: ethAmount}(address(this),tokenAmount,0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (PAJEETSTAN.sol#1333-1347)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (PAJEETSTAN.sol#1309-1321)
	External calls sending eth:
	- swapAndLiquify(contractTokenBalance) (PAJEETSTAN.sol#1221)
		- recipient.transfer(amount) (PAJEETSTAN.sol#1155)
		- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: ethAmount}(address(this),tokenAmount,0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (PAJEETSTAN.sol#1333-1347)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _accBalances[sender] = _accBalances[sender].sub(amount,Insufficient Balance) (PAJEETSTAN.sol#1225)
	PAJEETSTAN._accBalances (PAJEETSTAN.sol#807) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- PAJEETSTAN._basicTransfer(address,address,uint256) (PAJEETSTAN.sol#1245-1255)
	- PAJEETSTAN._transfer(address,address,uint256) (PAJEETSTAN.sol#1183-1241)

	- PAJEETSTAN._basicTransfer(address,address,uint256) (PAJEETSTAN.sol#1245-1255)
	- PAJEETSTAN._transfer(address,address,uint256) (PAJEETSTAN.sol#1183-1241)

		- _accBalances[address(this)] = _accBalances[address(this)].add(feeAmount) (PAJEETSTAN.sol#1387)

	- PAJEETSTAN._basicTransfer(address,address,uint256) (PAJEETSTAN.sol#1245-1255)

	- PAJEETSTAN.takeFee(address,address,uint256) (PAJEETSTAN.sol#1369-1395)
